items.headline: From the endpoint to the prompt: a unified data security vision in Cloudflare One

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare One unifies data security from endpoint to prompt: RDP clipboard controls, operation-mapped logs, on-device DLP, and Microsoft 365 Copilot scanning via API CASB.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare One unifies data security from endpoint to prompt: RDP clipboard controls, operation-mapped logs, on-device DLP, and Microsoft 365 Copilot scanning via API CASB.

items.headline: Ending the "silent drop": how Dynamic Path MTU Discovery makes the Cloudflare One Client more resilient

content.excerpt_text: The Cloudflare One Client now features the ability to actively probe and adjust packet sizes. This update eliminates the problems caused by tunnel layering and MTU differences, providing more stability and resiliency.

source_payload.html: The Cloudflare One Client now features the ability to actively probe and adjust packet sizes. This update eliminates the problems caused by tunnel layering and MTU differences, providing more stability and resiliency.

items.headline: How Automatic Return Routing solves IP overlap

content.excerpt_text: Automatic Return Routing (ARR) solves the common enterprise challenge of overlapping private IP addresses by using stateful flow tracking instead of traditional routing tables. This userspace-driven approach ensures return traffic reaches the correct origin tunnel without manual NAT or VRF configuration.

source_payload.html: Automatic Return Routing (ARR) solves the common enterprise challenge of overlapping private IP addresses by using stateful flow tracking instead of traditional routing tables. This userspace-driven approach ensures return traffic reaches the correct origin tunnel without manual NAT or VRF configuration.

items.headline: A QUICker SASE client: re-building Proxy Mode

content.excerpt_text: By transitioning the Cloudflare One Client to use QUIC streams for Proxy Mode, we eliminated the overhead of user-space TCP stacks, resulting in a 2x increase in throughput and significant latency reduction for end users.

source_payload.html: By transitioning the Cloudflare One Client to use QUIC streams for Proxy Mode, we eliminated the overhead of user-space TCP stacks, resulting in a 2x increase in throughput and significant latency reduction for end users.

items.headline: Always-on detections: eliminating the WAF “log versus block” trade-off

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare is introducing Attack Signature Detection and Full-Transaction Detection to provide continuous, high-fidelity security insights without the manual tuning of traditional WAFs. By correlating request payloads with server responses, we can now identify successful exploits and data exfiltration while minimizing false positives.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare is introducing Attack Signature Detection and Full-Transaction Detection to provide continuous, high-fidelity security insights without the manual tuning of traditional WAFs. By correlating request payloads with server responses, we can now identify successful exploits and data exfiltration while minimizing false positives.

items.headline: Mind the gap: new tools for continuous enforcement from boot to login

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare’s mandatory authentication and independent MFA protect organizations by ensuring continuous enforcement, from the moment a machine boots until sensitive resources are accessed.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare’s mandatory authentication and independent MFA protect organizations by ensuring continuous enforcement, from the moment a machine boots until sensitive resources are accessed.

items.headline: Defeating the deepfake: stopping laptop farms and insider threats

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare One is partnering with Nametag to combat laptop farms and AI-enhanced identity fraud by requiring identity verification during employee onboarding and via continuous authentication.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare One is partnering with Nametag to combat laptop farms and AI-enhanced identity fraud by requiring identity verification during employee onboarding and via continuous authentication.

items.headline: Moving from license plates to badges: the Gateway Authorization Proxy

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare’s Gateway Authorization Proxy adds support for identity-aware policies for clientless devices, securing virtual desktops, and guest networks without a device client.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare’s Gateway Authorization Proxy adds support for identity-aware policies for clientless devices, securing virtual desktops, and guest networks without a device client.

items.headline: Stop reacting to breaches and start preventing them with User Risk Scoring

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare One now incorporates dynamic User Risk Scores into Access policies to enable automated, adaptive security responses. This update allows teams to move beyond binary "allow/deny" rules by evaluating continuous behavior signals from both internal and third-party sources.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare One now incorporates dynamic User Risk Scores into Access policies to enable automated, adaptive security responses. This update allows teams to move beyond binary "allow/deny" rules by evaluating continuous behavior signals from both internal and third-party sources.

items.headline: Introducing the 2026 Cloudflare Threat Report

content.excerpt_text: There has been a fundamental shift toward industrialized cyber threats, highlighted by a record 31.4 Tbps DDoS attack and sophisticated session token theft. Our new report examines how nation-states and criminal actors have moved beyond traditional exploits to "living off the XaaS" within legitimate enterprise logic.

source_payload.html: There has been a fundamental shift toward industrialized cyber threats, highlighted by a record 31.4 Tbps DDoS attack and sophisticated session token theft. Our new report examines how nation-states and criminal actors have moved beyond traditional exploits to "living off the XaaS" within legitimate enterprise logic.

items.headline: Evolving Cloudflare’s Threat Intelligence Platform: actionable, scalable, and ETL-less

content.excerpt_text: Stop managing ETL pipelines and start threat hunting. Introducing new visualization, automation, and enrichment tools in the Cloudflare Threat Intelligence Platform to turn massive telemetry into instant security posture.

source_payload.html: Stop managing ETL pipelines and start threat hunting. Introducing new visualization, automation, and enrichment tools in the Cloudflare Threat Intelligence Platform to turn massive telemetry into instant security posture.

items.headline: How Cloudy translates complex security into human action

content.excerpt_text: Cloudy is our LLM-powered explanation layer built directly into Cloudflare One. Its explanations, now part of Phishnet and API CASB, can improve user decisions and SOC efficiency.

source_payload.html: Cloudy is our LLM-powered explanation layer built directly into Cloudflare One. Its explanations, now part of Phishnet and API CASB, can improve user decisions and SOC efficiency.

items.headline: From reactive to proactive: closing the phishing gap with LLMs

content.excerpt_text: Email security is a constant arms race. Like WWII engineers reinforcing only the planes that returned, survivorship bias hides real gaps. But LLMs can help us find the invisible weaknesses.

source_payload.html: Email security is a constant arms race. Like WWII engineers reinforcing only the planes that returned, survivorship bias hides real gaps. But LLMs can help us find the invisible weaknesses.

items.headline: See risk, fix risk: introducing Remediation in Cloudflare CASB

content.excerpt_text: Cloudflare CASB Remediation lets security teams go beyond visibility to fix risky file sharing in Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace directly from Cloudflare One, all in just a few clicks.

source_payload.html: Cloudflare CASB Remediation lets security teams go beyond visibility to fix risky file sharing in Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace directly from Cloudflare One, all in just a few clicks.

items.headline: Modernizing with agile SASE: a Cloudflare One blog takeover

content.excerpt_text: In 2026, agile SASE is the engine for modernization. Discover how Cloudflare One secures humans, devices, and AI agents on a single, programmable connectivity cloud.

source_payload.html: In 2026, agile SASE is the engine for modernization. Discover how Cloudflare One secures humans, devices, and AI agents on a single, programmable connectivity cloud.

items.headline: Beyond the blank slate: how Cloudflare accelerates your Zero Trust journey

content.excerpt_text: Project Helix simplifies and accelerates the onboarding process for Cloudflare One. By using automation and Terraform templates, this tool allows customers to quickly deploy a comprehensive, best-practice configuration in minutes.

source_payload.html: Project Helix simplifies and accelerates the onboarding process for Cloudflare One. By using automation and Terraform templates, this tool allows customers to quickly deploy a comprehensive, best-practice configuration in minutes.

items.headline: The truly programmable SASE platform

content.excerpt_text: As the only SASE platform with a native developer stack, we’re giving you the tools to build custom, real-time security logic and integrations directly at the edge.

source_payload.html: As the only SASE platform with a native developer stack, we’re giving you the tools to build custom, real-time security logic and integrations directly at the edge.

items.headline: Toxic combinations: when small signals add up to a security incident

content.excerpt_text: Minor misconfigurations or request anomalies often seem harmless in isolation. But when these small signals converge, they can trigger a security incident known as a toxic combination. Here’s how to spot the signs.

source_payload.html: Minor misconfigurations or request anomalies often seem harmless in isolation. But when these small signals converge, they can trigger a security incident known as a toxic combination. Here’s how to spot the signs.

items.headline: We deserve a better streams API for JavaScript

content.excerpt_text: The Web streams API has become ubiquitous in JavaScript runtimes but was designed for a different era. Here's what a modern streaming API could (should?) look like.

source_payload.html: The Web streams API has become ubiquitous in JavaScript runtimes but was designed for a different era. Here's what a modern streaming API could (should?) look like.

items.headline: The most-seen UI on the Internet? Redesigning Turnstile and Challenge Pages

content.excerpt_text: We serve 7.6 billion challenges daily. Here’s how we used research, AAA accessibility standards, and a unified architecture to redesign the Internet’s most-seen user interface.

source_payload.html: We serve 7.6 billion challenges daily. Here’s how we used research, AAA accessibility standards, and a unified architecture to redesign the Internet’s most-seen user interface.
